Description:
**NOTE**: Host requires CD2 Update 17 or above
  **NOTE**: Only the host is required to have MEV to add korlok sprouts into the stationary pool.

  A noticeable step-up from DW & a few influences from ITGN. Adds new enemies consisting a mixed variety of trash mobs & HVTs. More intense extractions. Grunt waves & elite grunts spawn periodically.
  
  b28:
  - Rockpox Exploder Breeder spawn cost reduced from 250 to 225 but rarity increased from 7 to 9 & max spawn count reduced from 2 to 1
  - Rush Praetorian max spawn count reduced from 30 to 20
  - Spawn interval of Elite Blobbers increased from 20 to 30 secs
Name: DP_b28
